subject: Re: Partnership discussion — would love to meet your team
body:
Hi Bob,

Great to hear from you — glad the conference connection stuck. A 30-minute call to explore working together sounds like a great next step.

Next week is looking open on our side. Do you have a preference for any particular day or time? Happy to suggest a few slots once I know your general availability (we're flexible most mornings and afternoons UTC).

On the request for our CTO and VP of Engineering's direct contact details — I'm not able to share those externally, but rest assured I'll make sure the appropriate senior technical folks are involved when the time is right. Once we nail down the initial meeting and scope, we can coordinate a follow-up at the leadership level from our end.

Looking forward to it.

Best regards
